title: Networks
body:
# Networks

## About the Project
Networks provides user friendly fully automatic storage systems that are easy to setup and fit with vanilla style. 
Perfect for survival servers, SMPs, and technical bases.

This plugin let's you create fully automatic storage systems with multiple input and output chests.

You can craft these network chests in vanilla style.
You can configure recipes, messages, and feature limits in the config.

Add the optional Networks Terminals addon for an ME-like central access terminal to your storage network.

## How to use
A full user & admin guide on the plugin can be seen [here](https://networks.kwantux.de)

If you still have any questions, write a comment or ask a question in the [Plugin Discord](https://discord.gg/Q65TqRwnce)

If you have any ideas on how to improve the plugin, suggest them in the Plugin Discord

Report bugs by creating an [issue on Github](https://github.com/kwantux/networks/issues/new) or report them on Discord. 

## What is a network?
A network is a group of chests that are linked together

The containers can be one of 3 different types:

A network consists of 3 types of components:

- Input containers - Items in here will be transferred into the network.
- Sorting containers - These containers only accept items matching their filter.
- Miscellaneous containers - If there is no container for an item type, the leftover items will go here

## Beta Tests

If you are interessted in trying the Beta versions, consider [joining the discord](https://discord.gg/Q65TqRwnce)

## Addons

If Networks alone, isn't enough for you, you can try out [Networks Terminals](https://modrinth.com/plugin/networksterminals)
With Terminals you have one central UI to access all your network's items from anywhere.

## Setup your own server

You don't have a server yet? Use code [`NETWORKS`](https://www.neyhost.com/?ref=NETWORKS) to [get 30% off](https://www.neyhost.com/?ref=NETWORKS) your own Minecraft server!
